description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The check_code job runs in the default stage, uses the coala/base Docker image and executes the command `coala --ci`. The release job runs only on the master branch, uses the python:3-alpine image, runs a before_script to install twine, then runs `python .ci/adjust_version.py bugspots3/VERSION -b `date --utc +%Y%m%d%H%M%S`` followed by `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel` and `twine upload dist/* -u "$PYPIUSER" -p "$PYPIPW"`, referencing the PYPIUSER and PYPIPW secret variables.
